intro: Hey there! I'm Avie — or you might know me by my IGN, NotAHuman. I'm a software engineer who loves building cool stuff. Feel free to scroll down and get to know me better!

about.description: Hi there! I'm a Software Engineer from Malaysia with a strong passion for web development. I love learning new things, taking on challenges, and contributing to meaningful projects. If you have an exciting opportunity that matches my skills, I’d be happy to chat! In my free time, you’ll often find me gaming on Steam—always up for a good adventure or co-op session!
about.title: ABOUT

contact.title: CONTACT ME
contact.description: Have a question or want to work together? Leave your details and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.failure: Message failed to send. Please try contacting me through a social platform from the menu.
